settings.heading: Three things we won't cut corners on.

settings.title: Considered Materials
settings.body: Every fiber, finish, and glaze is sourced for what it does over years, not what it costs over weeks.

settings.title: Honest Pricing
settings.body: We list our cost-of-goods on every product page. No reference prices, no fake sales, no inflated MSRP.

settings.title: Tested in Households
settings.body: Two hundred volunteer homes test every Daily piece for at least 90 days before it ships.

settings.title: OEKO-TEX® Linen
settings.body: Woven in Lithuania from European flax. Softens with every wash. Naturally hypoallergenic and machine-washable.

settings.title: Food-Grade Ceramic
settings.body: Wheel-thrown stoneware, lead-free FDA-approved glaze. Heavy on the floor, gentle on whiskers.

settings.title: Vegetable-Tanned Leather
settings.body: Full-grain hides tanned with chestnut bark in Tuscany. No chrome, no shortcuts.
